LAW AND MOTION, 302, MDEFENDANT SWICKARD SF CORPORATION MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE. NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE MOTION WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING, AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1005(B), AND THE MOVING PARTY HAS NOT FILED THE VERIFIED APPLICATION OF COUNSEL, AS REQUIRED BY CAL. R. CT. 9.40(C)(1). THE STATE BAR LETTER IS INSUFFICIENT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SWICKARD SF CORPORATION MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Denied without prejudice. The motion was not filed at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b), and the moving party has not filed the verified application of counsel, as required by Cal. R. Ct. 9.40(c)(1). The State Bar letter is insufficient.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
